title: LlamaCppRuntime KV cache control (quantization q4/q8, occupancy stats)
goal: Implement KvCacheOps for LlamaCppRuntime: set_quantization to q4/q8 via llama-cpp-2 type_k/type_v context params (rebuild context on switch), occupancy stats (bytes_used from llama_cpp_2 kv_cache state, bytes_capacity from n_ctx * n_kv_layers * head_dim * type_size), evict_all (llama_kv_cache_clear).
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/llama_cpp/kv_cache_impl.rs implementing KvCacheOps for LlamaCppKvCache; integration with context.rs to expose per-model handle; tests.
unblock_conditions: MT-063 KvCacheOps trait + MT-074 generate path merged.
implementation_notes: Per AC-LLAMACPP-ADAPTER + spec §4.7.1b (KV caching PRODUCTION): llama.cpp KV cache quantization shipped 2024 with `--cache-type-k q4_0|q8_0|f16|...` and `--cache-type-v q4_0|q8_0|f16|...`; llama-cpp-2 exposes via LlamaContextParams type_k / type_v. Set quantization path: switching quant level requires context rebuild (cannot mutate existing KV in-place to a new quant); set_quantization records the new policy and triggers a deferred rebuild on next load (or immediate rebuild + invalidate prefix cache if model loaded). Occupancy stats: query llama_cpp_2 LlamaContext::kv_cache_size() or compute manually as `n_ctx * n_layer * n_kv_head * head_dim * (type_size_k + type_size_v)`. Prefix cache: llama.cpp does not have a built-in prefix-share API; implement an in-process LRU layered over llama_cpp_2 by caching `(content_hash, llama_kv_cache_state_snapshot)` tuples. prefix_commit copies the current KV state via llama_state_seq_get_data into a buffer, hashes input tokens, stores LRU entry. prefix_restore uses llama_state_seq_set_data to load the buffer. Replay-resistant: on restore, recompute content_hash from prefix_tokens stored in handle and compare against KvPrefixHandle.content_hash — mismatch returns KvCacheError("prefix handle hash mismatch"). evict_all clears all prefix entries + calls llama_kv_cache_clear. set_quantization with KvQuantSupport::None on a model whose capability says supports_kv_quantization=None returns CapabilityNotSupported. Tests (env-gated): load model, prefix_commit some tokens, generate, prefix_restore returns hit, hit counter increments; tamper handle hash, restore fails; switch quant from f16 to q4 — verify context rebuilt and prefix cache flushed.
risk_if_missed: KV caching technique (INF-2 PRODUCTION) has no concrete LlamaCppRuntime impl; spec §4.7.1b technique fails AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.
validator_focus: Quant switch invalidates prefix cache (correctness); tamper detection on restore; LRU eviction does not leak memory under load; capability gate honored.

minimum_controls: Quant switch flushes prefix cache (verify hit miss on restore after switch).
LRU eviction bounded (memory does not grow unbounded under 1000 commits).
